title: lithophila vermicularis
intro: Lithophila vermicularis, also known as Creeping Jenny, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Podostemaceae family and is native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lithophila vermicularis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lithophila vermicularis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
